sections.paragraph:
Original: רדנים דּדנים

Transliteration: dôdânı̂ym rôdânı̂ym

Phonetic: do-daw-neem'

BDB Definition:

Dodanim or Rodanim = "leaders"

Rodaniym (1Ch 1:7)

  1. sons or descendants of Javan

Origin: a plural of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
